Can be used for Vinyasa, Ashtanga & Yin Yang Flow, Aerial Yoga and Yogastics
Valid for all offerings except: Private Yoga Session, Aerial Yoga - Strength, Stretch & Relax @Escale d'Orient, Ashtanga Flow @Escale d'Orient, SUP Yoga

Seaview Ashtanga Flow Classic @Senegliss Surf School Corniche des Almadies
This 60-minute Ashtanga Flow Classic class is inspired by the primary series and is suitable for all levels, both beginner and intermediate students. Seaview Ashtanga Flow Twist @Senegliss Surf School Corniche des Almadies
This 60-minute Ashtanga Flow Twists class is inspired by the primary series and is suitable for all levels, both beginner and intermediate students. Energize your morning with the Morning Radiance Flow class.

This refreshing session is designed to kickstart your day with vibrant energy and clarity. We'll begin with invigorating breathwork to awaken your senses, followed by a dynamic series of poses that build strength, flexibility, and balanc...
Each session is made up of different modules combining Aerial Yoga, classical yoga, gymnastics, and playful movement games. Yin Yang Flow @Senegliss Surf School Corniche des Almadies
The class combines two yoga styles into one practice.

Yin yoga involves slow, passive poses held for longer durations, targeting deep connective tissues and joints. Yang yoga is more active, focusing on muscles and blood flow to build strength and stamina. In the first half of the class, we energ...
Immerse yourself in the unique blend of Stand Up Paddling and Yoga with our SUP Yoga Experience. Using your paddleboard as a yoga mat, you'll practice in harmony with nature, surrounded by the soothing sounds of the sea and the rhythm of your breath.
